nodes.title: OpenSpec: memory-trajectory-timeline
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline. Adds a Trajectory sub-tab to RufloMemoryPanel showing `type:trajectory` AgentDB memory entries per issue, with outcome chips, relative timestamps, lazy IPC fetch, and strict-then-fallback filtering.

nodes.title: 1.1: Add subTab state to RufloMemoryPanel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §1.1. Add `subTab: 'search' | 'trajectory'` state (default `'search'`) to `RufloMemoryPanel`. Reset to `'search'` in the `useEffect` that watches `taskId`.

nodes.title: 1.2: Refactor state into searchTab / trajectoryTab objects
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §1.2. Refactor existing search state into a `searchTab` object (`{ status, results, hasOpened }`); add a parallel `trajectoryTab` object with `TrajectoryLoadState`.

nodes.title: 1.3: Render 2-segment tab control in RufloMemoryPanel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §1.3. Render a 2-segment control (`[ Search ] [ Trajectory ]`) between the collapsible header and the content area when `open` is true.

nodes.title: 2.1: Create MemoryTrajectoryTab.tsx component file
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.1. Create `src/components/task-detail/MemoryTrajectoryTab.tsx` accepting `{ taskId: string; title: string }` props.

nodes.title: 2.2: Implement parseTrajectoryKey()
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.2. Implement `parseTrajectoryKey(key: string)` inline — splits on `|`, extracts `type:`, `outcome:`, `ts:`, `issue:`, `openspec:` segments; returns `null` if `type:` segment is missing or is not `'trajectory'`.

nodes.title: 2.3: Implement outcomeChipClass()
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.3. Implement `outcomeChipClass(outcome?: string): string` — returns Tailwind class strings per the palette in Decision 5; neutral default for unknown outcomes.

nodes.title: 2.4: Implement lazy IPC fetch with rufloMemorySearch
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.4. Implement lazy IPC fetch: on first mount-while-active, call `commands.rufloMemorySearch(\`${title} type:trajectory issue:${taskId}\`)`, parse all results via `parseTrajectoryKey`, keep only `type:trajectory` entries.

nodes.title: 2.5: Apply issue-id filter with fallback
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.5. Apply optional issue-id filter (keep only `issueId === taskId`); if that produces zero entries, fall back to the broader `type:trajectory` set.

nodes.title: 2.6: Sort entries by ts descending
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.6. Sort entries by `ts` descending; push entries with undefined `ts` to the bottom.

nodes.title: 2.7: Render each trajectory row
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.7. Render each row: relative timestamp (e.g. "2h ago") with absolute ISO string in `title` attribute; outcome chip; short preview (first 120 chars); expand-on-click full content (same expand-in-place idiom as Search).

nodes.title: 2.8: Render loading, error, and empty states
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §2.8. Render loading state ("Loading…"), error state ("Could not load memories"), and empty state (instructive blurb referencing `openspec-beads-work` skill) per Decision 6.

nodes.title: 3.1: Verify Search sub-tab spec scenarios after refactor
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §3.1. Verify all existing scenarios in `openspec/specs/ruflo-memory-panel/spec.md` are satisfied on the Search sub-tab after the sub-tab refactor. No behavioral change permitted.

nodes.title: 3.2: Confirm namespace exclusion preservation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §3.2. Confirm the Search tab's namespace exclusion (`session`, `default`) is preserved; confirm Trajectory tab does NOT apply that exclusion.

nodes.title: 4.1: Unit test for parseTrajectoryKey
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.1. Unit test for `parseTrajectoryKey`: (a) canonical key with all six segments returns all fields, (b) key missing `outcome:` segment returns `outcome: undefined`, (c) key missing `ts:` segment returns `ts: undefined`, (d) key with `type:retrospective` returns `null`, (e) malformed key with no `|` separators returns `null`.

nodes.title: 4.2: Unit test for outcomeChipClass
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.2. Unit test for `outcomeChipClass`: assert known outcomes return the expected Tailwind class string; assert an unrecognized string returns the neutral default class.

nodes.title: 4.3: Unit test for formatRelative
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.3. Unit test for `formatRelative`: assert "just now" for 0 s, "Xm ago" for 30 min, "Xh ago" for 5 h, "Xd ago" for 3 d, ISO date for 60 d.

nodes.title: 4.4: Component test for MemoryTrajectoryTab with mixed entries
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.4. Component test for `MemoryTrajectoryTab` with a mocked `rufloMemorySearch` returning a mix of trajectory and non-trajectory entries: assert only trajectory entries render and order is `ts`-descending.

nodes.title: 4.5: Component test for strict-then-fallback filter
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.5. Component test for the strict-then-fallback filter: mock returns two entries with `type:trajectory` but only one with the matching `issue:` segment; assert both appear when the strict filter would reduce to one and the fallback kicks in (i.e. the broader set renders when strict is empty, not when strict is non-empty).

nodes.title: 4.6: Component test for empty state
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.6. Component test for empty state: mock returns zero trajectory entries — assert the instructive blurb appears.

nodes.title: 4.7: Component test for tab-reset behavior
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §4.7. Component test for tab-reset behavior: render `RufloMemoryPanel`, switch to Trajectory, change `taskId` prop, assert `subTab` returns to `'search'` and trajectory cache is cleared.

nodes.title: 5.1: bun tsc --noEmit passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.1. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes (no new TypeScript errors).

nodes.title: 5.2: bun test passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.2. `bun test` passes (all new unit and component tests green).

nodes.title: 5.3: Manual: trajectory entry visible with chip, timestamp, preview
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.3. Manual: in `bun tauri dev`, open an issue with at least one trajectory entry written by `obws_mem_write_trajectory`. Expand Related memories, switch to Trajectory tab, confirm the entry appears with outcome chip, relative timestamp, and preview. Click to expand; confirm full content visible.

nodes.title: 5.4: Manual: empty-state blurb on fresh issue
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.4. Manual: open a fresh issue with no trajectory entries; Trajectory tab shows the instructive empty-state blurb referencing `openspec-beads-work`.

nodes.title: 5.5: Manual: Search tab unchanged behavior
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.5. Manual: confirm Search tab still behaves identically to today — lazy fetch on first expand, label-augmented query, expand-in-place, namespace filter active, no sub-tab control visible until panel is opened.

nodes.title: 5.6: Manual: sub-tab resets on issue navigation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.6. Manual: verify that navigating from an issue with trajectory history to a fresh issue resets the sub-tab to Search and clears both caches.

nodes.title: 5.7: openspec validate passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/memory-trajectory-timeline/tasks.md §5.7. `openspec validate memory-trajectory-timeline` passes.
